issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive effect during opponent's turn), not 'Activated' (player-initiated action). The card text states 'If you have 10 DON!!...' which is a conditional passive effect, not an activated ability.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text explicitly states '[Opponent's Turn]', meaning the power boost applies only during opponent's turn, not until end of turn.
Condition uses 'HasRestingDon' but should use 'HasAttachedDon'. The effect requires 10 DON!! cards 'on your field' (attached to the character), not resting DON!! cards.
